top_signals.title: US Stocks Fall on Report Iran Is Halting Messages With US
top_signals.summary: US stocks edged lower on Monday after an Iranian report that the country will stop exchanging messages with the US, triggering a spike in oil prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sanmar Shipyards Celebrates 50 Years with Ten-Tugboat Order at ITS 2026
top_signals.summary: Sanmar Shipyards has solidified its position as a global leader in maritime construction by securing new build contracts for up to ten tugboats during the International lug & Salvage (ITS) Convention Exhibition & Awards 2026.The milestone agreements coincide with the shipbuilder's…

top_signals.title: Strategy sells 32 BTC in first Bitcoin sale since 2022; Stock falls on open
top_signals.summary: The world's largest public Bitcoin holder reduced its stash to 843,706 BTC, while raising $128.3 million through Class A stock sales.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Gnosis Pay exploit hits delay module as team pledges refunds
top_signals.summary: Gnosis Pay faces an active exploit in its delay module as co‑founder Martin Köppelmann walks back a warning urging users to withdraw funds and vows to repay those affected.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Interactive Brokers Integrates AI into Client Portfolios – Informed by Agentic Technology, Controlled by the Client
top_signals.summary: Clients Can Research Stocks, Analyze Performance, and Generate Trade Instructions in Claude. The Client Approves Every Trade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
